hero.title: Create the Perfect Gift Book for Your Child

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From photo to printed book in 4 simple steps

step1.title: Tell Us About Your Child
step1.description: Name, age, personality, and favorite things — just 60 seconds.

step2.title: Upload a Photo
step2.description: One clear face photo. We'll transform it into an illustrated character.

step3.title: Choose Your Style
step3.description: Pick from 4 gorgeous illustration styles and prose or rhyme.

step4.title: AI Creates Your Book
step4.description: In under 5 minutes, get a complete 32-page illustrated story.

looksLikeChild.title: It Looks Like YOUR Child
looksLikeChild.description: Our AI transforms their photo into an illustrated character that's recognizably them — not a generic avatar.

storyQuality.title: Story Quality That Surprises
storyQuality.description: Written by Claude AI with the craft of a real children's book author. Parents say they genuinely enjoy reading it aloud.

readyFast.title: Ready in Under 5 Minutes
readyFast.description: No waiting days or weeks. Answer a few questions, upload a photo, and watch your book come to life in real-time.

artStyles.title: 4 Gorgeous Art Styles
artStyles.description: From dreamy watercolors to bold modern illustrations. Each style is consistent across all 32 pages.

printQuality.title: Premium Print Quality
printQuality.description: Professional hardcover or softcover, printed at 300 DPI with vibrant colors. Ships worldwide.

perfectGift.title: The Perfect Gift
perfectGift.description: Grandparents, aunts, uncles — everyone wants to give the child they love their very own book.

sarah.quote: My daughter screamed 'THAT'S ME!' when she saw herself in the book. Worth every penny.
sarah.name: Sarah M.

david.quote: The story quality blew me away. It doesn't read like AI — it reads like a real children's book.
david.name: David K.

linda.quote: I ordered one for each grandchild. They absolutely LOVE seeing themselves as the hero.
linda.name: Linda R.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Free to create and preview. Only pay when you order a printed copy.

q1.question: How long does it take to create a book?
q1.answer: The wizard takes about 2 minutes. AI generation takes 3-5 minutes. You'll have a complete book preview in under 10 minutes total.

q2.question: How accurate is the character to my child's photo?
q2.answer: Our AI creates an illustrated version that is clearly recognizable as your child — same face shape, hair, and features — but rendered in a beautiful illustration style.

q3.question: How long does shipping take?
q3.answer: Standard shipping is 7-10 business days. We print and ship from the nearest fulfillment center worldwide.

q4.question: Can I edit the story after it's generated?
q4.answer: Yes! You can edit the text on any page and regenerate illustrations before ordering.

q5.question: Is it safe for kids? What about content moderation?
q5.answer: Every story goes through an AI safety review to ensure age-appropriate content. All illustrations are checked for quality and appropriateness.

cta.title: Create a Book They'll Treasure Forever
cta.subtitle: It takes less than 5 minutes. Start for free.

q1.question: How long does it take to create a book?
q1.answer: The creation wizard takes about 2 minutes. AI generation takes 3-5 minutes. You'll have a complete book preview in under 10 minutes total.

q2.question: What age range are the books designed for?
q2.answer: Our books are designed for children ages 3-8, the picture book sweet spot. The AI adjusts vocabulary and story complexity based on the child's age.

q3.question: What photo should I use?
q3.answer: A clear, front-facing photo with good lighting works best. Avoid heavy shadows, sunglasses, or photos where the face is partially hidden.

q4.question: Can I include multiple children in one book?
q4.answer: This feature is coming soon! Currently, each book features one child as the main character.

q1.question: How accurate is the illustrated character?
q1.answer: Our AI creates a character that is clearly recognizable as your child — same face shape, hair color, and features — but beautifully rendered in your chosen illustration style.

q2.question: Is the content safe and age-appropriate?
q2.answer: Absolutely. Every story goes through an automated safety review checking for age-appropriateness, bias, and content quality before you see it.

q3.question: Can I edit the story?
q3.answer: Yes! After generation, you can edit the text on any page and regenerate illustrations (up to 3 times per page) before ordering.

q1.question: What's the print quality like?
q1.answer: We use professional print-on-demand with 300 DPI printing, vibrant colors, and premium paper. Hardcovers are built to last through many bedtime readings.

q2.question: Where do you ship?
q2.answer: We ship to over 150 countries worldwide through our printing partner's global fulfillment network.

q3.question: How long does shipping take?
q3.answer: Standard shipping is 7-10 business days to most locations. Books are printed at the nearest fulfillment center to minimize transit time.

q4.question: What's your return policy?
q4.answer: If there's a print quality issue, we'll reprint and ship a replacement at no cost. Contact us within 30 days of delivery.
